caption: The video features an individual standing at a podium, delivering a speech. The person is dressed in traditional attire, consisting of a white kurta and vest, and has a white beard. They are positioned in front of a dark, textured wall with a geometric pattern. Two microphones are placed on the podium, one black and one red, indicating that the speech is being recorded or broadcasted. To the right of the podium, there is a decorative element that appears to be a tall, cylindrical vase containing pink flowers and a golden staff. The setting suggests a formal event, possibly a press conference or an official address. The individual's posture and expression convey a sense of authority and seriousness as they speak.
